---
name: New mouse support
about: Request support for another wireless mouse
labels: new-device, profile
---

## Mouse
- Brand / model:
- Connection mode: 2.4G / wired / Bluetooth
- Official driver battery percentage:

## Diagnostics
Please attach the ZIP generated by:

Device Profiles -> Export Diagnostics

## Learning Mode
If possible, also run:

Device Profiles -> Collect Battery Candidates

Then attach `battery-candidates.json` and any `profile-drafts` files.

## Notes
Describe whether the mouse was charging, wired, wireless, or idle during collection.
